name: Allied Cash Advance
description_short: Window Rock, AZ's Allied Cash Advance offers quick payday and title loans at the NE Corner of US Highway location.
description_long:
Allied Cash Advance in Window Rock, AZ is located at the NE Corner of US Highway, serving residents with convenient access to payday and title loan services. This standalone location is open Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 6 PM, and Saturday from 10 AM to 2 PM, giving Window Rock residents flexible hours to visit when needed.

At this Window Rock location, you can access payday loans, title loans, and related financial services. Call +1 928-482-2468 to speak with the team about your specific needs, get a quick quote, or to confirm current hours.

Window Rock residents typically visit for quick cash when unexpected expenses arise. Bring your ID, proof of income, and banking details to speed up the application process. Allied Cash Advance provides a straightforward alternative to traditional bank loans at this local storefront.
address: NE Corner US Highway, 264 Indian Rte 12 Unit 6 Unit #6, Window Rock, AZ 86515

company_info.headquarters: NE Corner US Highway, 264 Indian Rte 12 Unit 6 Unit #6, Window Rock, AZ 86515

pros: Same-day funding available for in-store applicants using debit cards (as fast as 30 minutes)
No explicit credit score requirement—company considers applicants with bad or no credit
Convenient physical location with extended hours (10 AM–6 PM weekdays, Saturday morning availability)
High customer satisfaction: 4.9-star Google rating with 377 verified reviews
Quick application process described as taking minutes to complete
Staff praised by name in reviews for professionalism, patience, and helpfulness
Multiple application methods: online, in-store, and remote reloans for existing customers
cons: APR rates, fee structures, and maximum loan amounts are not disclosed on the website
Unsecured installment loans typically carry higher interest rates than traditional bank loans
Limited to physical store locations—no indication of mobile lending or expanded geographic availability
Website was down for 'system maintenance' at time of review, suggesting potential technical reliability concerns
No mention of credit-building benefits or financial counseling services despite short-term lending focus
best_for: Consumers who need cash within hours and can visit a physical location in person
Borrowers with poor or no credit history who have been rejected by traditional banks
Arizona residents needing vehicle-based lending with proof of ownership
Existing customers looking to refinance or reload current installment loans
diagnosis: Allied Cash Advance is best for borrowers in Arizona who need emergency cash within hours and have access to a physical store location, particularly those with poor credit or no credit history. The major caveat is that the website does not disclose APR rates, fees, or maximum loan amounts, making it impossible to assess the true cost of borrowing before applying—consumers must contact the store directly or apply to receive pricing details.
services: Installment loans (unsecured personal loans with fixed repayment schedules)
Same-day in-store funding (up to 30 minutes with debit card)
Netspend Prepaid Mastercard (reloadable debit card alternative)
Retail remote refinancing for existing customers
Retail remote reloans for existing customers
meta_description: Window Rock, AZ: Allied Cash Advance at NE Corner US Highway. Quick payday & title loans, fast approval.
